qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree in Structural Engineering, Civil Engineering, Materials Engineering, or closely related discipline with NET/GATE
qualification.details: Postgraduate degree in Structural Engineering, Civil Engineering, Materials Engineering, or a closely related discipline with NET/GATE. Candidates with research experience related to construction materials, electrochemistry, durability of reinforced concrete structures, and corrosion of steel in cementitious systems will be preferred. The requirement of NET/GATE may be relaxed for candidates who have graduated from Centrally Funded Technical Institutes (CFTIs) with CGPA of more than 8.000 (80% aggregate marks).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 02-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Jr. Research Fellow position at IIT Delhi is 02 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Jr. Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: A postgraduate degree in Structural Engineering, Civil Engineering, Materials Engineering, or a closely related discipline with NET/GATE is required. Research experience in specific areas is preferred.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Jr. Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 37,000/- per month plus HRA @27%.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Jr. Research Fellow position at IIT Delhi?
faq.answer: You need to apply via email by sending your complete application with all required documents before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is IITD/IRD/154/2026.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the Jr. Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Jr. Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from CFTIs with a good CGPA apply without NET/GATE?
faq.answer: Yes, the NET/GATE requirement may be relaxed for candidates graduating from CFTIs with a CGPA of more than 8.000.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for this role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves application screening and a review of the email submission.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article.
